error[E0317]: `if` may be missing an `else` clause
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/gemma-3-12b/declarations/function_specifiers_2/sample_001/target.rs:18:5
   |
17 |   fn g(i: i32) -> ! {
   |                   - expected `!` because of this return type
18 | /     if i > 0 {
19 | |         stop();
20 | |     }
   | |_____^ expected `!`, found `()`
   |
   = note:   expected type `!`
           found unit type `()`
   = note: `if` expressions without `else` evaluate to `()`
   = help: consider adding an `else` block that evaluates to the expected type

  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/gemma-3-12b/declarations/function_specifiers_2/sample_001/target.rs:30:5

29 |

   |     ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ unreachable statement
   |
